endpoints.purpose: Evaluate caller-supplied, source-owned Core evidence for the first high-cash opportunity signal family and persist created candidates through the internal idempotency and audit repository foundation.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 06 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller already has source-authorized evidence references, source-reported cash weight, an Idempotency-Key, and candidate persistence capability.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a live source-ingestion API, data-product certification proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, or supported-feature promotion. PostgreSQL persistence, replay, and source-ingestion recovery proof applies only when the PostgreSQL repository adapter is configured and does not certify production storage, live Core source-worker readiness, or supported product readiness.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.candidate.persist capability.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details when the idempotency key was already used with a different request payload.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.

endpoints.purpose: Return a source-safe internal detail projection for a persisted idea candidate, including redacted source evidence, lifecycle history, review, feedback, conversion, report-evidence, audit summary posture, and caller entitlement-scope enforcement when scope headers are present.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 10 and Slice 11 API foundation when an internal caller has idea.candidate.detail.read capability or an advisor/operator role, is within any provided caller entitlement scope, and needs a source-safe evidence-drawer projection for an existing candidate.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Read-only Gateway publication exists through lotus-gateway GET /api/v1/ideas/candidates/{candidate_id}, including entitlement-scope header forwarding. Do not use as Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, source-system route disclosure, raw evidence export, downstream authority, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.
request_examples: GET /api/v1/idea-candidates/idea_high_cash_8d57adbf52f7f5a7 with X-Caller-Capabilities: idea.candidate.detail.read and X-Caller-Portfolio-Ids: PB_SG_GLOBAL_BAL_001
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.candidate.detail.read capability or an allowed advisor/operator role, or when caller entitlement-scope headers do not match the persisted candidate scope.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when candidateId is blank or caller entitlement-scope headers contain blank values.

endpoints.purpose: Evaluate an internal AI explanation workflow result or deterministic fallback against a persisted idea candidate with redaction, source-claim verification, forbidden-action blocking, source-safe lineage recording, and bounded operation telemetry.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 09 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller has a persisted candidate, idea.ai-explanation.evaluate capability, and needs governed AI explanation evaluation without provider execution.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as lotus-ai runtime proof, AI provider execution proof, autonomous advice, suitability approval, downstream authority, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion. Use the separate AI lineage store proof artifact for source-safe persistence evidence.

response_examples: {"requestId":"ai-explanation-001","candidateId":"idea_high_cash_8d57adbf52f7f5a7","workflowPack":{"workflowPackId":"lotus-ai:idea-explanation:v1","workflowPackVersion":"v1","purpose":"advisor_rationale_draft","evaluationRef":"lotus-ai:governed-verifier:v1","sourceAuthority":"lotus-ai"},"posture":"ready_for_advisor_review","verifierOutcome":"passed","explanationText":"Candidate has elevated idle cash and source-ready evidence.","reasonCodes":["ai_verifier_passed"],"fallbackUsed":false,"fallbackReason":null,"grantsDownstreamAuthority":false,"auditEventType":"idea.ai_explanation.evaluated","redactedEvidence":{"candidateId":"idea_high_cash_8d57adbf52f7f5a7","family":"high_cash","lifecycleStatus":"ready_for_review","reviewPosture":"advisor_review_required","evidencePacketId":"iep_high_cash_8d57adbf52f7f5a7","evidenceContentHash":"sha256:evidence-lineage","supportability":"ready","sourceRefs":[{"productId":"lotus-core:PortfolioStateSnapshot:v1","sourceSystem":"lotus-core","productVersion":"v1","asOfDate":"2026-06-21","freshness":"current","dataQualityStatus":"complete"}],"reasonCodes":["high_cash_ratio","review_required"],"unsupportedReasons":[],"scorePolicyVersion":"idle-liquidity-v1","score":"82","sourceSignalCount":1},"verifiedOutput":{"outputId":"ai-output-001","claimIds":["claim-001"],"proposedActionTypes":["advisor_review"],"verifierRanAtUtc":"2026-06-21T10:12:30Z"},"approvedMetadataKeys":["channel"],"aiLineageRecorded":true,"aiLineagePersistenceDecision":"accepted","durableStorageBacked":false,"lotusAiRuntimeExecuted":false,"supportedFeaturePromoted":false}

409 returns product-safe Problem Details when rationale or meeting-preparation drafting is requested before ready evidence and review-ready lifecycle, or when an AI request id is replayed with changed lineage.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails, approved metadata contains forbidden keys, or workflow output is invalid.

endpoints.purpose: Return source-safe operator readiness for the internal AI explanation foundation, including guardrail availability, supportability posture, and certification blockers.

Repo-owned model-risk dashboard and alert artifacts are certified by the AI model-risk operations proof gate; this endpoint reports that posture but does not promote product support by itself. AI lineage store and model-risk operations proofs are consumed by aggregate implementation-proof readiness, not promoted by this endpoint alone.

endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as candidate detail, raw queue evidence export, candidate identifier discovery, access-scope inspection, durable queue store proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, PM/compliance queue support, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.

error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks the operator role or idea.review.queue.readiness.read capability.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when evaluatedAtUtc is absent, invalid, or not timezone-aware.

endpoints.purpose: Return source-safe operator readiness for the internal high-cash Core source-ingestion run-once worker configuration, optional live-proof artifact validity, optional scheduled-worker deploy-proof validity, and certification blockers.

endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as live Core source-ingestion certification, data-product certification proof, platform source-manifest inclusion proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, business product discovery, downstream realization proof, or supported-feature promotion.

endpoints.purpose: Run one bounded internal high-cash Core source-ingestion pass for operators using the configured worker manifest, active repository provider, and Core source adapter while returning aggregate counts only.

endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as live Core source-ingestion proof, scheduled worker deploy-contract proof, certified long-running scheduling proof, data-product certification proof, platform source-manifest inclusion proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, business product discovery, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.

endpoints.purpose: Run one bounded internal outbox delivery pass for operators using the active repository provider and configured publisher adapter while returning aggregate counts only.

endpoints.purpose: Return the repo-authored lotus-idea data-mesh readiness posture, source-of-truth contract paths, and explicit blockers for internal operators.

endpoints.purpose: Report lightweight service health for diagnostics and platform smoke checks.

endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a readiness or dependency-quality signal.
error_examples: Unhandled service errors return product-safe Problem Details.

endpoints.purpose: Report whether the service process is live.
